test: Wilcoxon signed-rank two-sided + paired bootstrap CI (n=10000, seed=42)
note: Baseline = Week 10 agent candidate_output scores from tasks.jsonl. Trained = LoRA adapter outputs scored by scoring_evaluator.py. Bootstrap CI is on the per-task score delta (continuous 0-1 scale).

per_category.note: n=4: widest CI in dataset. Interpret as directional only.
Near-zero SFT lift expected and correct. Root cause is segment waterfall ordering bug in _classify_segment — a 2-line code fix, not an SFT problem. See agent_fixes/conversion_engine_patches.py.
Partial lift from better signal grounding. Root cause (non-thread-safe _LEADS dict) requires threading.Lock fix. See agent_fixes/conversion_engine_patches.py.
Primary SFT target. Largest n in held-out (n=7), most reliable estimate.

interpretation.primary_finding: Delta A = +29.6pp (p=0.000021, highly significant). SFT adapter substantially improves Tenacious-Bench scores on the sealed held-out partition.
interpretation.sft_target_categories: Tone Drift (+37.2pp) and Bench Over-Commitment (+40.0pp) — the two categories targeted by the SFT training data — show the largest lifts. Consistent with Path A rationale.
interpretation.sft_ceiling: ICP Misclassification shows only +1.7pp lift. This category requires correct segment waterfall logic — structural agent behaviour not addressable by email-composition SFT. Fix documented in agent_fixes/conversion_engine_patches.py.
interpretation.architecture_limit: Multi-Thread Leakage shows +19.0pp lift despite being classified as an architectural failure. Lift is attributable to better email-level signal grounding, not async race condition fixes. The threading fix is documented in agent_fixes/conversion_engine_patches.py.
interpretation.small_n_warning: 5 of 10 categories have n<6 in the held-out partition. Per-category CIs for these categories span ±30-40pp and should be treated as directional signals, not precise estimates. v0.2 should enforce minimum 8 tasks per category in held-out.
interpretation.delta_b_status: Delta B (prompt-engineered baseline) has not yet been measured. Run ablations/delta_b_eval.py to confirm SFT adds value beyond careful prompting.
interpretation.cost_efficiency: Training cost: $0 (Colab T4 free tier, 97.9 min). Inference overhead: +17.4% per task. Cost-per-point: ~$0.0001. Acceptable at Tenacious ACV range ($6K-$60K).
